review.reason: Segment 1 completed the fixed 8-node gate with correctness checks passing: five UNKNOWN and three replay-verified UNSAT certificates on t-7, t-8, and t-9. All three closures already exist as durable native-replayed certificates in campaign commit 9fedbce, so this tranche earned zero net-new global coverage. Redirect rather than spend later segments duplicating known work; preserve all artifacts and next bind a continuation only to genuinely unmeasured globally open leaves.
